parameters.query: INSERT INTO "BandejaRentaAirbnb" (email_raw, from_email, subject, received_at, estado, listing_id, guest_name, guest_email, message_extracted) VALUES ('{{ $json.body }}'::text, '{{ $json.email_remitente_limpio }}', '{{ $json.subject }}', '{{ $json.body.fecha_recepcion }}'::timestamptz, 'Pendiente', '{{ $json.listing_id_detectado }}', '{{ $json.guest_name_detectado }}', '{{ $json.guest_email_detectado }}', '{{ $json.guest_message_extraido }}') RETURNING id
